name: Zendure Power Control (IP/WiFi)
description: Controls a Zendure power station via direct IP connection based on Shelly EM3 measurement (v2: Improved status query)

description_lng.de: Steuert eine Zendure Powerstation über direkte IP-Verbindung basierend auf Shelly EM3 Messung (v2: Verbesserte Statusabfrage)

author: TheSolarApp

parameters.name: HOST
parameters.label: IP Address
parameters.description: IP address of the Zendure power station

parameters.name: SERIAL
parameters.label: Serial Number
parameters.description: Serial number of the Zendure power station

parameters.name: REVERSE_STARTUP_POWER
parameters.label: Charging Mode Startup Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to start charging mode

parameters.name: REVERSE_STOP_POWER
parameters.label: Charging Mode Stop Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to stop charging mode

parameters.name: STARTUP_POWER
parameters.label: Discharge Mode Startup Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to start discharge mode

parameters.name: STOP_POWER
parameters.label: Discharge Mode Stop Power (W)
parameters.description: Minimum power to stop discharge mode
